data.title: Marc Andreessen Emerges As Trump And Musk's Talent Scout For DOGE Cost Cutting Mission: Report
data.description: Venture capital powerhouse Marc Andreessen has emerged as a crucial figure in recruiting talent for President-elect Donald Trump's new Department of Government Efficiency.

data.title: Google's New AI Models Can Gauge How You Feel, But Experts Warn Of Bias, Abuse, And Dystopian Risks: 'We Cannot Infer Emotions From Facial Features Alone'
data.description: Google's launch of the PaliGemma 2 AI models, which claim to detect emotions from images, has sparked expert concerns over potential biases, misuse, and the scientific validity of emotion recognition.
